title: Mild Peruvian Potato Stew
description: A dense and salty Peruvian stew featuring massaman curry paste and ferment-kimchi, perfect for a romantic evening, this lacto-vegetarian-friendly dish is made in a Dutch oven.
instructions: Heat the Dutch oven over medium heat and add the chopped onion, cooking until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add the massaman curry paste and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly, until the paste is fragrant.
Add the chopped potatoes, vegetable broth, and coconut milk, stirring to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender.
Stir in the chopped ferment-kimchi, salt, and black pepper.
Transfer the stew to a serving dish and top with shredded cheese.
Serve hot, garnished with additional kimchi if desired.
